name: Emergent Script Gardens
description: Interacting ink-like and neon strokes follow golden-ratio phyllotaxis (137.5°) to self-organize into alien symbolic gardens. Bass drives growth iteration count. Mouse interaction plants dense stroke seeds with φ-boosted intensity. Temporal feedback creates organic overgrowth trails. ACES tonemapped with chromatic aberration.

params.name: Stroke Density
params.description: Number of interacting strokes in each symbolic garden cluster

params.name: Curvature
params.description: How strongly strokes bend through the local rule field

params.name: Garden Scale
params.description: Scale and spacing of emergent glyph clusters

params.name: Ink / Neon
params.description: Blend from minimal ink wash to luminous neon script
